overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, and dense urban architecture. The footage appears to be from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the vibrant Night City environment with its characteristic holographic advertisements and multi-level urban design.

scene_state.functional_zone: open neon-lit plaza with towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts down from vertical view of skyscrapers to horizontal street level
begins walking forward through the wet reflective plaza

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera down from the skyscrapers above and beginning to walk through the wet reflective plaza

entered.detail: tall building with large white RIOT logo and hexagonal pattern facade
cylindrical towers displaying rotating holographic advertisements
rain-soaked tiles reflecting neon lights in multiple colors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of towering skyscrapers adorned with neon signage, then tilts down to reveal a vast open plaza with wet reflective pavement. The camera begins walking through this cyberpunk city square, passing by cylindrical digital billboards while the iconic RIOT building dominates the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with cylindrical advertising pillars and red planters

events.description: passing cylindrical digital advertising pillars with changing holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking past the glowing cylindrical billboards and red planters while approaching the Fuyutsuki building

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: circular red planters with glowing cyan edges arranged in curved patterns
building with curved facade and orange neon Fuyutsuki signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the open plaza, the camera passes distinctive red cylindrical planters with glowing edges and tall cylindrical digital billboards displaying holographic advertisements. The Fuyutsuki building becomes visible on the right as pedestrians walk through the neon-lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level with vehicle traffic and stairway entrance

events.description: turning right toward the street with moving traffic
beginning to ascend the concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: turning toward the street, passing vehicles, and climbing the stairs to the upper level

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving along the wet street

entered.detail: wide concrete stairway leading up between buildings
building facade with bright red neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward a street with moving vehicle traffic, passing a storefront with bright red neon lighting. The scene transitions as the camera approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete stairway leading to an upper pedestrian level, with the Fuyutsuki building now visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food stalls and overhead bridges

events.description: passing food stall with green neon lighting and traditional red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow upper-level passages and passing by a street food vendor

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive red hair walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: street food cart with green neon lighting and traditional red paper lanterns
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street
wall with colorful neon graffiti art

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow covered pedestrian walkway, the camera passes a food stall illuminated by green neon and red lanterns. The environment features overhead walkways connecting buildings, graffiti-covered walls, and dense urban architecture as the camera continues exploring the upper levels of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, open city plaza into the dense, multi-level corridors of a cyberpunk district. It begins with a dramatic tilt from towering neon skyscrapers down to a vast square of wet, reflective pavement, moving past cylindrical digital billboards with the RIOT building looming in the background. As the camera advances through the plaza, it passes glowing red planters and holographic advertisements before turning toward a bustling street with moving traffic and bright red storefronts. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a wide concrete stairway to an upper pedestrian level, leaving the Fuyutsuki building behind to the left. Finally, the environment narrows into a covered walkway filled with graffiti-covered walls and overhead bridges, passing a food stall illuminated by green neon and red lanterns.
